selections.name: Poor Ol' Johny Ray (NZ)
selections.reason: Consistent form including a solid 3rd at Bendigo on slow going. Draws well and looks ready to break through.

selections.name: Mungerannie
selections.reason: Back from jumps racing and has proven ability to handle heavy going well.

selections.name: Farasi
selections.reason: Improved run last start and the inside draw is a significant advantage on this track.

selections.name: Mortal Peak
selections.reason: Has form on slow tracks and can figure in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Parrot Club
danger_horse.reason: Needs to improve but gets a soft run from the inside barrier.

selections.name: Eton Affair
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd on a heavy track last start. Draws perfectly for the short straight and is the clear top pick.

selections.name: Red Rabbit
selections.reason: Inside draw is gold here. Had solid form prior to her last start and can bounce back.

selections.name: Narilao
selections.reason: First starter with good jumpout form. The wide draw is a slight concern but has ability.

selections.name: Admire Mercury
selections.reason: Placed on heavy going two starts back and can improve here.

danger_horse.name: Mighty Mystic
danger_horse.reason: First starter, watch betting markets for confidence.

selections.name: Come Dancing
selections.reason: Solid 3rd on a heavy track here last start. Looks ready to peak.

selections.name: Divine Provenance
selections.reason: Resuming as a gelding and won a recent trial. The inside draw suits perfectly.

selections.name: Typhoon Ali
selections.reason: New stable and trialled well recently. Commands respect.

selections.name: Diamond Mila
selections.reason: The inside draw is a massive plus on this track and can improve sharply.

danger_horse.name: Zwasp
danger_horse.reason: Can improve second up after a fair run on heavy going.

selections.name: Overpriced
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten here on heavy going last start. Draws perfectly to go one better.

selections.name: Ngongotaha
selections.reason: Strong 2nd on heavy at Donald. Handles the conditions well and draws nicely.

selections.name: She's Astunnerarch
selections.reason: Good 3rd on heavy last start. The wide draw is the only negative.

selections.name: Ceylon Diamond (NZ)
selections.reason: Forgive last run. Trialled well prior and can figure.

danger_horse.name: Crunch Time (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Better for debut run and can improve here.

selections.name: Infinite Jest
selections.reason: Won well here on heavy last start. Proven mudlark who can overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: Deadly Press
selections.reason: Won on soft last start and draws well. Strong contender.

selections.name: Midnight Glow
selections.reason: Consistent type who handles wet tracks and will be running on strongly.

selections.name: Great Prosperity
selections.reason: Placed on heavy previously and can figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Square Deal
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw gives him a chance at odds.

selections.name: Silver Pledge (NZ)
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten on heavy last start. Ready to win.

selections.name: Kazungula
selections.reason: Good 2nd on soft last start and the inside draw is ideal.

selections.name: Winston
selections.reason: Consistent form on wet tracks gives him solid claims.

selections.name: Zeyno
selections.reason: Can improve on recent runs and handles soft conditions.

danger_horse.name: Genrichero (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Forgive last run on heavy, capable of better.

selections.name: Just Dance
selections.reason: Won well on soft last start and handles the distance perfectly.

selections.name: First Day
selections.reason: Inside draw is a big advantage and has solid form on wet tracks.

selections.name: Avonview
selections.reason: Placed on heavy last start. Wide draw is a concern but has ability.

selections.name: Perfuse (GB)
selections.reason: Good 4th on heavy last start and draws well.

selections.name: Nasraawy
selections.reason: Won well here on heavy last start. The inside draw is perfect for this track's short straight.

selections.name: Unapproachable
selections.reason: Won here on heavy last start. Wide draw is a negative but has the ability to overcome it.

selections.name: Steamy Mist
selections.reason: Good 3rd on heavy last start and handles the conditions well.

selections.name: Gina's A Star
selections.reason: Won on heavy last start and draws well.

danger_horse.name: Turnaquid
danger_horse.reason: Solid form on wet tracks and can figure.
